benchmark_metadata.command: python scripts/benchmark_control_reward.py --tune-heuristic --seeds 11 22 33 --train-timesteps 500000 --eval-episodes 10 --tune-episodes 3 --risk-level increased --w-bo 1.0 2.0 4.0 --w-cost 0.02 0.06 0.10 --w-disr 0.0 --algo ppo --output-dir outputs/benchmarks/control_reward_tuning --artifact-label control_reward_tuning --step-size-hours 168 --max-steps 260 --stochastic-pt
